title: All Nodes Distance K in Binary Tree
input_format: The root of a binary tree, a target node value, and an integer k.
output_format: An array of node values at distance k from target.
constraints: n in [1, 500], Node.val in [0, 500], unik val, k in [0, 1000]
function_signature: function distanceK(root: TreeNode | null, target: number, k: number): number[]
